Localization.Description: A user created or removed a rule, or a user changed a parameter value of a rule

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} created the rule "{datafield7}" with the parameter "{object.property}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the value of the parameter "{object.property}" of the rule "{datafield7}" from "{object.value}" to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the rule "{datafield7}" on host {event_src.host}
